title: Men of Chance
writer: Louis Weitzenkorn, Louis Stevens, Eddie Welch
actors: Ricardo Cortez, Mary Astor, John Halliday
plot: Hoping to get even with gambler/bookie Johnny Silk, racetrack owners and partners Dorval and Farley convince down-and-out Martha Preston to pose as a rich, single French countess, whom Silk falls in love with and asks to marry. Af...
